Commented on #1431 SDRPlay not working on MacOS ARM.

SDRplay plugin cannot locate libsdrplay_api.so.3 and requires manual API service start Problem On macOS, SDR++ v1.3.0 fails to load the SDRplay source plugin after installing SDRplay API 3.15.1 because the app bundle cannot find libsdrplay_api.so.3 . The SDRplay API library is installed at: /Library/SDRplayAPI/3.15.1/lib/libsdrplay_api.so.3.15 But SDR++ tries to resolve it via the app bundle @rpath , for example: /Applications/SDR++.app/Contents/Frameworks/libsdrplay_api.so.3 /Applications/SDR++.app/Contents/MacOS/../Frameworks/libsdrplay_api.so.3 Those paths do not exist by default, so the plugin fails to load. Initial error [ERROR] Couldn't load /Applications/SDR++.app/Contents/Resources/../Plugins/sdrplay_source.dylib: dlopen(/Applications/SDR++.app/Contents/Resources/../Plugins/sdrplay_source.dylib, 0x0005): Library not loaded: @rpath/libsdrplay_api.so.3 Referenced from: /Applications/SDR++.app/Contents/Plugins/sdrplay_source.dylib (1 more line was trimmed) Workaround Creating a symlink in the app bundle fixes the plugin loading issue: sudo mkdir -p "/Applications/SDR++.app/Contents/Frameworks"
(2 more lines were trimmed) After that, sdrplay_source.dylib loads correctly. Second issue: API service must be started manually Even after fixing the library path, SDR++ only works with SDRplay after manually starting the SDRplay API service from a terminal first: /Library/SDRplayAPI/3.15.1/bin/sdrplay_apiService Then launching SDR++ works: /Applications/SDR++.app/Contents/MacOS/sdrpp Relevant successful log lines: [INFO] SDR++ v1.3.0 [INFO] Loading /Applications/SDR++.app/Contents/Resources/../Plugins/sdrplay_source.dylib (4 more lines were trimmed) Expected behavior On macOS, SDR++ should either:
Locate the SDRplay API library where the official SDRplay installer puts it, or configure the expected runtime path correctly. Handle the SDRplay API service requirement automatically, or show a clear error explaining that sdrplay_apiService is not running. Actual behavior sdrplay_source.dylib fails to load because @rpath/libsdrplay_api.so.3 is unresolved. After manually fixing the library path, SDRplay still requires manually launching /Library/SDRplayAPI/3.15.1/bin/sdrplay_apiService before starting SDR++. Environment OS: macOS SDR++: v1.3.0 SDRplay API: 3.15.1 SDRplay API library path: /Library/SDRplayAPI/3.15.1/lib/libsdrplay_api.so.3.15 SDRplay API service path: /Library/SDRplayAPI/3.15.1/bin/sdrplay_apiService Notes Other startup warnings/errors about optional modules such as audio_source , harogic_source , perseus_source , spectran_http_source , and usrp_source appear unrelated. The SDRplay source works once the API library path is fixed and the API service is manually started.
